claim: The report includes statistical intervals only for samples meeting the bootstrap threshold.
Queue outcomes are sensitive to hidden-ahead, latency, and cancel-rate assumptions in the synthetic fixture.
Surface safety diagnostics reject unsafe synthetic smiles and expose quote-filter statuses.
Policy ablation rows are quote-mechanics checks only, not market-return evidence.
The report uses a no-login public IEX TOPS sample for real quote/trade diagnostics.
Public TOPS evidence does not support individual visible queue or fill claims.
